initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE d.type IN ('OWNER', 'DISPENSER')
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1 AND 'OWNER' IN (SELECT type FROM disp WHERE client_id = c.client_id);

SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE d.type IN ('OWNER', 'DISPENSER')
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1;

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE d.type IN ('OWNER', 'DISPENSER')
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1 AND 'OWNER' IN (SELECT type FROM disp WHERE client_id = c.client_id);

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE d.type IN ('OWNER', 'DISPENSER')
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1
AND 'OWNER' IN (SELECT type FROM disp WHERE client_id = c.client_id);

SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE d.type IN ('OWNER', 'DISPENSER')
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1 AND 'OWNER' IN (SELECT type FROM disp WHERE client_id = c.client_id);

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE d.type IN ('OWNER', 'DISPENSER')
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1;
